trends.headline: Glycolic acid body sticks are SkinTok's 'strawberry skin' summer smoother
trends.body: With shorts-and-swimsuit season here, creators are swiping glycolic acid body sticks on arms and thighs to fade 'strawberry skin' and keratosis pilaris bumps before sun's out. Film a 2-week 'smooth skin before vacation' before/after on bumpy upper arms, or a 'how I prep my legs for shorts' body-care routine.

metadata.context: Glycolic acid body exfoliant trending for smooth, bump-free skin ahead of summer

trends.headline: 'Blokette' dressing is FashionTok's sporty-meets-girly summer formula
trends.body: Blokette — a jersey or sporty top paired with a flippy skirt and comfy flats — is the styling formula creators love because it refuses to pick a lane between athletic and feminine. Shoot a 'one jersey, three blokette outfits' styling reel, or a 'getting ready in blokette for a summer day out' GRWM.

metadata.context: Sporty-feminine styling formula creators use for mix-and-match summer outfit content

trends.headline: Yogurt tiramisu is FoodTok's high-protein no-bake dessert of the moment
trends.body: A lightened-up tiramisu made from thick yogurt, Lotus Biscoff cookies and coffee is racking up saves as the protein-friendly summer dessert you don't have to turn the oven on for. Film a 'high-protein tiramisu in 4 layers' assembly ASMR, or a '300-calorie dessert that tastes illegal' macro-breakdown video.

metadata.context: No-bake high-protein dessert recipe trending as a summer treat

trends.headline: The Sleepy Girl Mocktail is FoodTok's wind-down drink creators keep remixing
trends.body: Tart cherry juice, magnesium powder and a splash of soda — the 'Sleepy Girl Mocktail' is surging again as a nightly wind-down ritual, with creators testing whether it actually helps them sleep. Film a 'I drank the Sleepy Girl Mocktail for a week — honest results' diary, or a 'building my 9pm wind-down drink' cozy ASMR.

metadata.context: Tart-cherry-and-magnesium wind-down drink trending as a nightly ritual

trends.headline: #30Realistic is FitTok's gentler answer to all-or-nothing challenges
trends.body: The #30Realistic challenge — hard workouts at least two days a week plus 7,500 steps on the other days for 30 days — is gaining traction as the doable, guilt-free alternative to extreme month-long programs. Post a 'Day 1 of #30Realistic' kickoff, or a weekly check-in showing your two workouts and your step screenshots.

metadata.context: Sustainable 30-day fitness challenge trending as a softer alternative to extreme programs

trends.headline: 'Dopamine decor' is HomeTok's bright, maximalist pushback on beige
trends.body: Saturated color, bold prints and joy-first styling — 'dopamine decor' is the mood-boosting trend creators are using to swing away from the quiet beige and grandma-core looks of recent months. Film a 'beige room to dopamine decor' transformation, or a 'shop my color: styling one bold hue around a room' haul.

metadata.context: Bright, maximalist interior styling trending as a reaction to neutral decor

trends.headline: Misting handheld fans are TechTok's must-demo heat-wave gadget
trends.body: Handheld fans with a built-in water-mist feature are flooding 'summer survival' feeds, with creators holding them to a thermometer to show the temp drop or filming slow-mo mist on a sweaty walk. Make a 'gadgets that got me through a heat wave' roundup, or a 'misting fan vs regular fan' on-camera temperature test.

metadata.context: Water-misting handheld fan trending as a demo-friendly summer cooling gadget

trends.headline: The foldable 3-in-1 magnetic charger is TravelTok's summer-trip tech pick
trends.body: A wallet-sized folding charger that powers a phone, watch and earbuds at once on MagSafe/Qi2 is the travel gadget creators keep unfolding on camera as summer trip season ramps up. Film a 'one charger for my whole carry-on' packing reel, or a 'tech I never travel without' fast-cut roundup.

metadata.context: Foldable multi-device magnetic charger trending as a summer-travel essential

trends.headline: The pop-up portable playpen is ParentTok's summer-outdoors must-buy
trends.body: Instant pop-up playpens that fold flat into a bag are surging on ParentTok as families take play to the backyard, park and beach this summer. Film a 'setting up our pop-up playpen in 10 seconds' demo, or a 'how we contain a crawler at the beach' day-out vlog.

metadata.context: Portable pop-up playpen trending for outdoor summer play

trends.headline: The 3-in-1 dog water bottle is PetTok's summer-walk hydration buy
trends.body: A travel dog bottle that combines a one-press water dispenser, a treat compartment and a poop-scraper is trending as the all-in-one tool for hot-weather walks. Film a 'everything I carry on a summer dog walk' POV, or a 'keeping my dog hydrated on the trail' demo of the press-and-drink bottle.

metadata.context: All-in-one travel dog water bottle trending for hot-weather walks

trends.headline: 'Snackpacking' is TravelTok's convenience-store-haul travel format
trends.body: 'Snackpacking' — building part of a trip around a destination's everyday food culture via convenience-store hauls and supermarket crawls — is the travel format racking up views this summer. Film a 'I tried every snack at a 7-Eleven abroad' taste-test, or a 'gas-station snack haul, ranked' roadtrip carousel.

metadata.context: Food-focused travel format built around convenience-store and supermarket hauls

trends.headline: Jewelry stacking is JewelryTok's defining 'more is more' summer look
trends.body: Layered necklace sets, ring stacks and bracelet piles are the look creators keep flexing as minimalism fades and storytelling-through-stacking takes over. Film a 'how to stack rings without it looking messy' styling guide, or a 'build a bracelet stack with me' mixed-metals demo.

metadata.context: Layered, stacked jewelry styling trending as a maximalist summer look
